label: SES-124 / CNV-026 close-out — governance backfill: author WT-059 (kickoff_prompt for PI-107) and WT-060 (kickoff_prompt for PI-031), each with an addresses edge to its PI, completing the ad-hoc-implemented PIs' kickoff-ticket trail. No code change, no decisions. Attaches to WS-011. Identifiers re-verify at apply time.

session.session_title: Backfill the PI-107 and PI-031 kickoff work tickets (WT-059, WT-060)
session.session_description:
Single Claude Code execution at Doug's terminal. CNV-026. Parent workstream WS-011 (V2 storage API refinements). Medium: chat (claude_code runner).

Seed: "fix the other PI".

Context: PI-107 and PI-031 (like PI-101, backfilled in SES-123) were selected ad hoc in conversation and implemented directly from their planning-item descriptions, so neither had a kickoff work ticket anchoring it — the standard v2 lifecycle anchors a unit of work as a planning_item plus an associated work_ticket of kind kickoff_prompt with an addresses edge to the PI. Doug asked to fix the remaining two.

Delivered (mirrors the SES-123 / WT-058 backfill pattern):
- Authored two retroactive kickoff documents, each clearly marked as a backfill: PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/prompts/CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-kickoff-pi-107.md and CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-kickoff-pi-031.md, summarizing each PI's goal, scope, acceptance, and resolution.
- Created work_ticket WT-059 (kind kickoff_prompt, status ready) for PI-107 — surface planning_item created/updated timestamps in the UI (commit f690bde, resolved by SES-118 / CNV-020) — with an addresses edge to PI-107.
- Created work_ticket WT-060 (kind kickoff_prompt, status ready) for PI-031 — Commits panel + planning_item resolution chain, schema-reconciled by DEC-332 (commit f5381966, resolved by SES-120 / CNV-022) — with an addresses edge to PI-031.

Governance-only backfill: no code changed and no decisions authored. The work_tickets and their addresses edges land via this close-out payload (the sanctioned path; creation goes through apply_close_out, not direct POST), which is itself checked by the PI-101 pre-flight validator at apply time. PI-107 and PI-031 remain Resolved; this session neither resolves nor addresses them at the session level — each WT carries the addresses edge. With WT-058 (SES-123), all three ad-hoc-implemented PIs this conversation produced now have the standard kickoff-ticket trail.
session.session_executive_summary: Governance backfill completing the kickoff-ticket trail for the two remaining ad-hoc-implemented PIs (after PI-101 / WT-058 in SES-123). Authored two retroactive kickoff documents and created work_ticket WT-059 (kickoff_prompt, ready) for PI-107 — surface planning_item timestamps in the UI — and WT-060 (kickoff_prompt, ready) for PI-031 — Commits panel + resolution chain — each with an addresses reference edge to its planning item. No code changed and no decisions were authored; a pure governance record backfill delivered via close-out payload and validated by the PI-101 pre-flight checks. PI-107 and PI-031 remain Resolved; all three PIs from this conversation now carry the standard planning_item -> work_ticket -> session trail.
